fields.Title: Number of Islands
fields.Pattern: Scan the grid; each unseen land cell starts a BFS that marks one whole component.
fields.Invariant: All cells already scanned or reached by prior BFS runs are non-land in the working array; each new land root contributes exactly one island.
fields.Code:
fold over array indices
  if current cell is '1': BFS mark its component and increment count
  otherwise continue
fields.Pitfall(s): Mark when enqueuing neighbors, not after repeated rediscovery, to avoid duplicate queue work.
